candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository provides text-to-speech (TTS) audio samples in MP3 format for a wide range of languages, generated using the Microsoft Edge TTS engine.

This repository offers text-to-speech (TTS) audio samples in MP3 format for 70+ languages and over 300 voices, all generated using the Microsoft Edge TTS engine. [Explore this comprehensive overview](https://geeksta.net/tools/tts-samples/) to discover the various voices and feat…
